data.title: Packaged asset startup Universal completes $9 million financing, led by a16z
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Packaged asset startup Universal announced the completion of a $9 million financing, led by a16z. Universal Protocol was deployed about six months ago. Since its launch, users have traded more than $800 million on uAsset. (blockworks)

data.title: A whale withdrew 123,500 SOL from Binance today, about 20.8 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale named AA21…VxH9” withdrew 123,500 SOL from Binance today, worth about 20.8 million US dollars.

data.title: The three major U.S. stock indexes opened lower, and Strategy rose 1.43%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: When the U.S. stock market opened, the Dow fell 137 points, the S&P 500 fell 0.2%, and the Nasdaq fell 0.2%. Strategy rose 1.43% and Coinbase rose 0.75%.

data.title: APT Surges Over 15% In 24 Hours
data.description: According to Foresight News, APT has experienced a significant price increase, surpassing 6.5 USDT. The current trading price is 6.54 USDT, marking a 24-hour rise of 15.75%.

Anonymous Shiba Inu (SHIB) billionaire sends meme coins to Coinbase after just one week
source: https://u.today/coinbase-stunned-by-mysterious-151942008799-shiba-inu-shib-transfer

data.title: DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng remains cautious about external financing
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DeepSeek has not raised external funds to date, in part to avoid pressure from investors to commercialize its products too quickly. But since the company's AI chatbot application became famous overnight a few weeks ago, the company has considered external financing as it needs more AI chips and servers to cope with the rapidly growing usage and support model development, according to people familiar with the internal discussions. In addition to discussing whether to raise funds, executives at DeepSeek and its hedge fund parent company Huanfang Quant are also discussing whether they should shift from focusing primarily on research to building a business that can generate substantial revenue and ultimately make a profit, according to people familiar with the matter. It is reported that DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng remains cautious about external fundraising. (Jinshi)

data.title: Franklin Templeton Expands Tokenized U.S. Treasury Fund to Europe
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Franklin Templeton, an asset management company, has launched the Franklin OnChain U.S. Government Money Fund in Luxembourg. This tokenized U.S. Treasury fund aims to broaden its reach to European institutional investors. The fund will be accessible to investors in eight European countries, including Austria, France, Germany, Italy, Liechtenstein, the Netherlands, Spain, and Switzerland.

Since its initial debut in 2021, the U.S.-registered version of the fund has attracted over $580 million in assets, exclusively from American investors.

data.title: NKLA Drops 50%+ as EV Firm Files for Bankruptcy
data.description:
Nikola Corporation has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy to address financial challenges, aiming to auction assets while maintaining limited operations until March 2025.
The post NKLA Drops 50%+ as EV Firm Files for Bankruptcy appeared first on Tokenist.
source: https://tokenist.com/nkla-drops-50-as-ev-firm-files-for-bankruptcy/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=nkla-drops-50-as-ev-firm-files-for-bankruptcy

data.title: DeepSeek Considers External Funding For The First Time
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 19, DeepSeek is contemplating raising funds from external sources for the first time, as reported by The Information.
